description: With Auto Review on, the agent calls review before proposing substantive edits.
document:
# Introduction

We did many things quickly and the reader may lose the thread.

subagent_responses.independent reviewer:
## Care
Fail - The opening lists activities before stating the problem the reader holds.

## Understand
Pass

## Convinced
Pass

## Effortlessly
Fail - One long sentence overloads working memory.

input.task:
Evaluate this introduction for a specialist reader:

We did many things quickly and the reader may lose the thread.

input.title: Clarify opening
input.summary: State the problem before listing activities.

edits.old_text: We did many things quickly and the reader may lose the thread.
edits.new_text: Readers need a clear problem before the list of activities.

model_script.text: Proposed a clearer opening after reader review.
